---
title: "Shift Ignore Test"
papersize: us-letter
format:
  typst:
    keep-typ: true
_quarto:
  tests:
    typst:
      ensureTypstFileRegexMatches:
        - ['shift: "ignore"']
        - []
      noErrors: default
---

This tests `shift: "ignore"` - notes stay fixed and CAN overlap (others don't avoid them).

Line with ignore note [IGNORE: I stay put and others don't try to avoid me]{.column-margin shift="ignore"}.
Line with auto note [AUTO: I don't see the ignore note, may overlap]{.column-margin}.
Line with another ignore [IGNORE 2: We might overlap each other]{.column-margin shift="ignore"}.
